title: arc-1
description: New project focused on AI-assisted SAP development workflows and tooling.

title: SAP AI MCP Servers
description: Curated overview of SAP MCP servers and SAP AI skills across official and community ecosystems.

title: ABAP MCP Server
description: ABAP-focused MCP server with search, docs, and ABAP-focused AI context endpoints.

title: MCP SAP Docs
description: MCP server for SAP docs including UI5, CAP, ABAP, and SAP Cloud SDK resources.

title: MCP SAP Notes
description: MCP server to search and retrieve SAP Notes with SAP Passport authentication.

title: LLM Benchmark ABAP Code Generation
description: Benchmark project for comparing model quality on ABAP code generation and feedback loops.

title: Network Request and Response Copier
description: Chrome DevTools extension for exporting request and response data with OData support.

title: UI5 OData Recorder
description: Record OData traffic from UI5 apps and generate data for FE mock server workflows.

title: UI5 Library Diff
description: Tooling to compare differences between UI5 versions for faster upgrade checks.

title: UI5 Spreadsheet Importer
description: Open source UI5 component for spreadsheet import in UI5 and Fiori elements applications.
